description.unified: Deals Physical Damage to all enemies and knocks them back.
Deals Physical Damage 3 times to enemies in front. Each hit knocks them down for [2 sec->1.2 sec] and increases their Physical Damage taken by [(added) 30%] for [(added) 7 sec].
Deals Physical Damage 5 time to a random enemy and nearby enemies, reducing their Attack Speed by [400->40%] for 10 sec. Against non-hero enemies, deals additional Physical Damage.

On Normal Attack, fires an additional projectile that deals extra Physical Damage to all enemies and increases your Attack by [(added) 0.5%] for [(added) 10 sec]. The Attack increase stacks up to [(added) 100 times] and cannot be dispelled.

light.unified: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by [(added) 100%]. [(removed) 25% P.DMG amp.]

dark.unified: Attack is increased by [35%->45%] for [10 sec->4 sec].
Damage dealt is reduced by [(added) 30%], but the number of hits is doubled. [(removed) removes ATK spd debuff, adds 3 sec stun.]

light.unified: Has a 15% chance to stun the target for 1 sec. [(removed) 0.5% ATK boost on crit hits.]

dark.unified: Damage dealt is reduced by [(added) 30%], but the number of hits is doubled. [(removed) activation chance changes to 80%.]

description.unified: [Roll Over] increases DMG by {0}% on every use and recovers 120 MP upon a Crit Hit. This effect stacks up to max 10 times.
[Miruru Pirates!] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0}%.
[Boooooom!] increases DMG by 50% and boosts ATK Spd by {0}[->%] for 3 sec upon activation.

dark.unified: On hit, gains [Darkness] stacks equal to the number of enemies struck. When [Darkness] reaches 50 stacks, all [Darkness] is consumed and you enter [Rampage] for 10 sec, increasing Attack Speed by [800->80%] and Attack by 20%.

description.unified: When using [KABOOM!] attacks, has a [50%->30%] chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase the target's Physical Damage taken by {1}% for 10 sec.
